per_criterion_scores.internal_note: The student failed to accurately define the problem, missing key elements such as the size of the dataset and specific search requirements.
The student did not demonstrate a clear understanding of how the problem relates to sorting and searching algorithms, failing to explain how these concepts apply to the problem.
The student did not translate the ill-defined problem into a well-defined task, failing to produce clear objectives and requirements for the sorting algorithm.

justification: The student demonstrated insufficient understanding across all criteria, failing to accurately define the problem, relate it to sorting and searching algorithms, and translate it into a well-defined task.
